gist.headline: Sticky notes and pixels
gist.blurb: StoryBoard AI just landed in the greenhouse. Map out your wildest ideas on an infinite canvas with AI-generated frames, sticky notes, and a whole lot of drag-and-drop magic.
gist.summary: Added StoryBoard AI, a visual planning application with an infinite canvas and AI image generation, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use a new community-built tool for visually mapping out stories and ideas.
gist.visual_concept: A storyboard or infinite canvas with sticky notes and image frames. Polly the bee acting as a director or planner, pinning things to a board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, pinning colorful sticky notes and image frames to a large wooden storyboard canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
